parameters.query:
INSERT INTO ai_usage_logs (book_id, operation_type, node_name, model, prompt_tokens, completion_tokens, total_tokens, metadata) 
VALUES (
  '{{ $node["Webhook Router"].json.body.bookId || $node["Init Book (Optional)"].json.id }}'::uuid,
  '{{ $node["Webhook Router"].json.body.action }}',
  'Agent: Writer',
  '{{ $json.model || "gpt-4o-mini" }}',
  {{ $json.usage ? $json.usage.prompt_tokens : 0 }},
  {{ $json.usage ? $json.usage.completion_tokens : 0 }},
  {{ $json.usage ? $json.usage.total_tokens : 0 }},
  '{{ JSON.stringify($json.usage || {}) }}'::jsonb
)
UPDATE paragraphs SET content = $1, status = 'COMPLETED', actual_word_count = $3, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = $2::uuid
SELECT string_agg(content, '\n\n' ORDER BY paragraph_number ASC) as combined_content FROM paragraphs WHERE chapter_id = $1::uuid AND paragraph_number < $2::integer AND status = 'COMPLETED'
SELECT prompt_text FROM public.ai_prompts WHERE name = 'WRITER' AND is_active = true AND (genre = $1 OR genre = 'GENERAL') ORDER BY CASE WHEN genre = $1 THEN 0 ELSE 1 END LIMIT 1
SELECT p.*, c.title AS chapter_title, c.summary AS chapter_summary, c.book_id FROM paragraphs p JOIN chapters c ON p.chapter_id = c.id WHERE p.id = $1::uuid
